title: Ilex tardieublotii

This family is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the Northern Hemisphere. The order Aquifoliales is a larger grouping that includes the family Aquifoliaceae. Ilex tardieublotii is thus classified as a flowering plant within the class Magnoliopsida.
